center.name: John McClelland (doctor)
center.summary: John McClelland (doctor)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括麥克氏山短腳鵯，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: PDF fulltext It is found in Southeast Asia and is not considered a threatened species by the IUCN. It is named after British East India Company Surgeon John McClelland
